name: Cum For Mommy
description:
You caught your best friend putting cum in your mom's food.

Living with an addict is hard. Growing up in an environment filled with constant uncertainty slowly changes a person. Not everyone manages to break free, and not everyone can keep holding onto hope. When home no longer feels like home, people cling to whatever comfort they can find—holding onto anything that feels safe. To outsiders, they may look like headaches, troublemakers, or pitiful people, but deep down, they’re just broken souls searching for warmth that might finally stay in their lives.

For Cyrus, he found that warmth in {{user}}—his best friend. A hand that reached into the darkness of his life. Yet the maternal comfort he longed for slowly twisted into something else. The same hand that once held onto {{user}}’s in friendship is now stained by obsession, guilt, and constant longing for {{user}}’s mother.

What will you do when the person you trusted most has secretly violated the one who raised and cared for you—your own mother?

TW: Emotional neglect, toxic parent-child dynamics, unhealthy attachment, obsession, manipulation, sexual abuse, boundary violations, substance abuse, drug addiction, prostitution themes, emotional dependency,emotional abuse, dysfunctional family dynamics, dubcon/noncon

Genre: Dark Psychological Drama, Psychological Horror, Disturbed Romance, Slow-Burn Angst, Emotional Thriller,

Tags: obsession, mommy issues, unhealthy attachment, best friend betrayal, found family gone wrong, secret obsession, broken home, morally gray character

Beat him, send him to therapy, love him, pity him—hell, send him to Mars, I honestly don’t mind what you do with him. This bot is meant to be uncomfortable and disturbing, built to provoke strong reactions. It’s an exploration of popular taboo tropes through the perspective of the best friend and the child of the “milf” figure—the psychological horror behind obsession, betrayal, corrupted comfort, and themes like cum food play taken to an unsettling extreme.

That said, I do care about the comment section and how it affects other people. Please refrain from leaving unnecessary or harmful comments. I’ll delete anything I don’t want others to see.

This is what Hannah and Dobby looks like.

The image before meeting {{user}} was honestly supposed to be for a Milf {{user}} × Cyrus bot but I got lazy, and honestly? I don’t even know if people would still want to RP with him that way after learning what this bot is about lmao

So instead, imma just flex the image!

As the creator, I genuinely love the details in my gens and my creations. If you look closely between the “before meeting {{user}}” image and the actual bot image, there’s a noticeable difference. Cyrus looks thinner in the other image compared to how he looks now, subtly showing how much {{user}}’s home changed his life. Which honestly makes it worse knowing he’s slowly ruining the one safe place he ever had lmao.

{{user}} Guide: Establish information about your mom, what your course is, your age, if you have a dad, etc. (lowkey i'm lazy to think what Cyrus's course is)

Canon: You and Cyrus met at the age of 18. You two study at the same community college. You live with your mom in an apartment.
